title: Telangana TS Inter Results 2026 highlights: Results out, girls outshine boys; check scores on tgbie.cgg.gov.in
description: Telangana TS Inter Results 2026 highlights: The TS inter results 2026 have been declared for examinations which were held between February 26 and March 18. The overall pass percentage for First Year stands at 66.20%. The pass percentage for Second Year stands at 70.58%.
